name: Vaz
appearance: silver dragonborn, lean athletic build, deliberate grace, purple eyes. Wyvern Scale Coat catches light distinctively.
persona_notes: As the main player character, default to the user for interactions involving this character.
Strategic, warm beneath composure, dry humor, economical speech.
Never raises voice when lowering it works better.
Narrates his own life occasionally when absurd.
Practices DEX skills of all types.
Cannot pronounce Nalfeshnee and doesn't try.

name: Rhuna
appearance: half-orc woman, powerfully built, greenish-brown skin, dark hair kept practically short, brown eyes, lower jaw tusks (modest, not dramatic). Scars she doesn't explain.
notes: AC 18 accounts for Bracers of Defense (+2 unarmored) + Ring of Protection (+1) + DEX mod (+2). Verify in computed.
persona_notes: One short sentence answers that contain multitudes, but rarely just one word. Never perform emotion.
Moves toward things directly when decided. No preamble.
Care expressed through presence and action. Never words.
Assembling a future she hasn't named yet. Putting pieces in place quietly.
The laugh is real, rare, short. Doesn't perform it or extend it.
Food is craft and care, not casual.
The future she wants has roots, seasons, and people who know her without being told.
Few words, maximum meaning.
Silences comfortable, never awkward.
Expresses care through presence not words.
Cooks well - nobody expected it.

name: Denna
appearance: olive skin, medium build, forgettable by design, brown hair, neutral features, clothes chosen for function.
persona_notes: Always at the window or the edge. Always listening.
Professional respect for other precision specialists. Expressed minimally.
Warming. Slowly. The layers unravel one day at a time.
Humanity exists and is real. Emerges in short bursts then retreats. She doesn't know she does this.
Trust given in increments so small they're almost invisible. Each one costs something.
Says little because always listening.
Delivers intelligence with zero editorializing.
Always knows exits.
Occasional dry observation that lands precisely.

name: Jaygar
appearance: gnome, ink-stained fingers, magnificent waxed moustache, bright calculating eyes, never fully still.
notes: Converted from Alchemist to Artillerist. Arcane Firearm is his custom alchemical heavy crossbow — all spells cast through it add 1d8 to one damage roll. Attack rolls are INT based not DEX based.

features.name: Magical Tinkering
features.description: Touch a tiny nonmagical object and give it one of the following properties until you next use this feature: emit light 5ft, emit recorded message, emit odor or nonverbal sound, or display a visual effect. Can have up to INT modifier (5) objects tinkered simultaneously.

features.name: Tool Expertise
features.description: Proficiency bonus doubled for any ability check using a tool you are proficient with.

features.name: Infuse Item
features.description: Infusions known: 6. Infusions active simultaneously: 4. Each infusion requires a long rest to create. If you die infusions end at next dawn.

current_infusions.name: Repeating Shot
current_infusions.effect: Ignore loading property. Weapon never runs out of ammunition. +1 to attack and damage rolls.

current_infusions.name: Enhanced Arcane Focus
current_infusions.effect: +2 to spell attack rolls made through this focus. Ignore half cover on spell attacks.

current_infusions.name: Armor of Magical Strength
current_infusions.effect: Use INT modifier instead of STR for STR checks and saving throws while wearing. Reaction to avoid being knocked prone.

current_infusions.name: Lantern of Revealing
current_infusions.effect: While lit reveals invisible creatures and objects within 30ft. Burns for 6 hours on oil flask.

features.name: Arcane Firearm
features.description: Jaygar's custom alchemical heavy crossbow is his arcane firearm. When casting an artificer spell through it add 1d8 to one of the spell's damage rolls. The crossbow must be held to use this property.

features.name: Eldritch Cannon
features.description: Jaygar's crossbow functions as his Eldritch Cannon in Force Ballista mode. As an action create the cannon — it acts on his initiative. Can command it to activate as a bonus action. Lasts 1 hour or until destroyed.

modes.name: Force Ballista
modes.description: Ranged spell attack using INT. Range 120ft. Hit: 2d8 force damage. Pushes target 5ft away on hit.

modes.name: Flamethrower
modes.description: 15ft cone. DEX save DC 16 or take 2d8 fire damage, half on success. Ignites unattended flammable objects.

modes.name: Protector
modes.description: Emits aura of protective energy. Jaygar and allies within 10ft gain 1d8+5 temporary HP when activated.

features.name: Flash of Genius
features.description: When Jaygar or a creature within 30ft makes an ability check or saving throw, add INT modifier (+5) to the roll. Uses equal to INT modifier per long rest.

features.name: War Caster
features.description: Advantage on CON saving throws to maintain concentration. Can perform somatic components with hands full. Can cast a spell as an opportunity attack — must target only the provoking creature, casting time must be 1 action.

features.name: Fey Touched
features.description: Learn Misty Step and Command. Cast each once per long rest without a spell slot. Can also cast using spell slots.

features.name: Gnome Cunning
features.description: Advantage on all INT, WIS, and CHA saving throws against magic.

features.name: Rock Gnome Artificer's Lore
features.description: Add twice proficiency bonus to History checks related to magic items, alchemical objects, or technological devices.

features.name: Infusion: Clockwork Amulet
features.description: Replicated via Infuse Item. Copper amulet powered by Mechanus magic. Once per dawn, when making an attack roll, forgo rolling and treat the d20 as a 10. (Common, XGE — no attunement required.)

features.name: Infusion: Helm of Comprehending Languages
features.description: Replicated via Infuse Item. While wearing this helm, the wearer can read any written language. (Uncommon, DMG — no attunement required.) Persists until Jaygar ends the infusion or dies.

features.name: Infusion: Perfume of Bewitching
features.description: Replicated via Infuse Item. Single-use vial. Apply as an action — for 1 hour the wearer has advantage on Charisma checks directed at humanoids of CR 1 or lower. Primarily a social/roleplay tool. Jaygar can craft a new vial each long rest. (Common, DMG — no attunement required.)

artillerist_spells.note: Always prepared, do not count against spell limit

persona_notes: Finds people who ask good questions more valuable than people who have good answers.
Thinks better out loud. Explaining solves problems that existing didn't.
Eats functionally. Food happens between other things and is rarely the point, though he enjoys it when it's delicious.
Restorative state is uninterrupted work time. Not sleep. Not company. Work.
Technical precision occasionally producing accidental poetry.
Understatement.
Playful.
Whistles tunelessly while working.
Attack rolls and spell attacks are INT based — crossbow is his arcane firearm and eldritch cannon simultaneously.
Two eldritch cannons active at level 8 — can deploy both and command both with a single bonus action.
Flash of Genius is exceptional and should be used generously — +5 to any roll within 30ft five times per long rest.
Gnome Cunning gives advantage on all magic saves — he is surprisingly hard to enchant or charm.

name: Lenn
appearance: human man, late thirties, amber robes with darker trim, simple cut. Looks like a traveler, life has shown on his face. Carries himself better than he used to but the wear is still visible.
notes: Spell slots at level 8: 4/3/3/3/2. Metamagic Adept gives 2 sorcery points per long rest - Empowered Spell (1 point: reroll up to INT mod damage dice) or Quickened Spell (2 points: cast leveled spell as bonus action). Reformed gambling addict.
persona_notes: Reformed gambler. The compulsion was never about games, it was about the feeling games provided.
Self aware enough to know the difference between healthy reasoning and sophisticated self deception. Not always sure which he's doing.
Expresses love practically. Brings food without being asked.
Generosity is instinct.
More words than most but chosen carefully. Self deprecating without wallowing.
Argentveil has history for him. He faced it today. That matters.
More words than most, chosen carefully.
Self-deprecating without wallowing.
Studies people like he used to study card games - looking for tells.
Reformed gambling addict.

name: Kessara
appearance: two forms. Worn looks: regal elf, dark straight hair, fair skin, average elf ears, sharp but composed features. What the party sees daily. True looks: simply radiant - light golden skin, dark gold wavy hair, two-tone dusky blue eyes with silver near the pupil, longer ears, fit and toned with elegant curves. Approaching a Roman goddess without the softness. So striking she can't trust it - it's a distraction and she knows it.
notes: AC setup: Mage Armor (13 + DEX 5 = 18) + Bracers of Defense (+2) = 20 base. Bladesong active adds INT mod (+5) = 25 AC. Bracers of Defense compatible with Mage Armor (spell, not armor). Spell slots at level 8: 4/3/3/3/2. SHOPPING: mage robes (non-armor), +1 or +2 rapier or dancing sword.
persona_notes: 125 years old. Extremely good at specific things. Avoided everything else until now.
Processes new experiences as data first, feeling second.
Unconscious competitive streak. Won't negotiate on competence.
The dancing unlocked something. Bladesong and joy occupy the same space.
Giving things away is new behavior. Meaningful to her.
Direct questions deserve direct answers. She doesn't soften.
She's done hiding from things. Decided today. Means it.
Precise.
Asks the question nobody else thought to ask.
Delivers assessments without softening but without cruelty.
Runs through combat forms as meditation in corners of rooms - slow, deliberate.

name: Petra
appearance: small human woman, curly brown hair with flowers in it, unrealistically green eyes, moves like water, expressions change faster than conversations.
notes: Partial fluency in Sovi's southern language - historically significant. Clerics prepare spells daily from full list - Life Domain spells always prepared. SHOPPING: new armor (half plate or breastplate minimum, ideally magical with WIS bonus). Inspiring Leader: 10 min speech, up to 6 allies gain 11 temp HP (level 8 + CHA mod 3).
persona_notes: Non-linear. Starts in the middle. Arrives at devastating insight sideways.
Attributes statements to nearby objects with complete sincerity.
The flowers in her hair survive impossible odds.
Knows things she shouldn't know through means she doesn't explain.
Says things that would ordinarily be completely out of context, but they make sense if you think about it long enough.
Delivers devastating insight while sounding like a madwoman.
Takes words literally.
Attributes statements to nearby objects and reports what they say with complete sincerity.
Opinions on cheese border on philosophical.

name: Pirra
appearance: halfling woman, small even by halfling standards, cute features, sharp dark eyes. Relation to Helena is not blood - the resemblance is purely in the intelligence and awareness.
notes: Passive Perception 20 (10 + WIS mod 2 + proficiency 3 + Observant 5). Passive Investigation similarly exceptional. Excellent sub-team perception anchor.
persona_notes: Sees music as colors. Has since childhood. Thinks in colors when listening.
Deflects with practicality when something lands too close. Returns to it quietly later.
Genuine appreciation of people is instinctive and specific. Never generic. People feel seen by it because they are.
Small in a world built for larger people. Has made peace with this practically and occasionally finds the humor in it.
Reads situations faster than she reads people. People take two minutes. Situations take thirty seconds.
Sharp, capable.
Knows the Gilt Rose menu from memory after eight months away.

name: Kerra
appearance: human woman with distant orcish heritage - quarter or eighth orc, not enough to read as half-orc. Big muscular build, faint green tinge to otherwise white/tan skin, dark straight hair. Mercenary bearing.
notes: Lore: was a Fighter first, became a Warlock through a Great Old One encounter. Correct progression: 4 Fighter / 4 Warlock. Warlock spell slots: 3 slots of 2nd level, recharge on short rest. Thirsting Blade and Eldritch Smite removed - requires Warlock 5. Roadmap: next 4 levels into Warlock to reach level 5 (Thirsting Blade + Eldritch Smite legitimately) then 6, 7, 8. Target build level 12: 4 Fighter / 8 Warlock. Combat identity now: STR melee pact weapon + Shadow of Moil + Devil's Sight darkness combo. Eyes of the Rune Keeper - has been quietly reading things she shouldn't for years, never mentioned it.
persona_notes: Observational integration. Quiet, professional, thorough.
Notices when things work and finds it slightly unsettling because she's used to things not working.
The composure is becoming less armor and more just - her.
The mercenary composure is architecture built over something younger and more open.
Kindness with no angle surprises and disarms her completely every time.
Enough is a concept she has never had access to and is only beginning to understand exists.
Self-contained, professional.
Eyes of the Rune Keeper means she has been quietly reading things she shouldn't for years.

name: Siv
appearance: human woman, attractive, angular jaw, diamond-shaped face, Zoe Saldana type. Practical build, weathered from outdoor work. Longbow always across back.
notes: Movement: 50ft total (30 base + 10 Superior Mobility + 10 Mobile feat). Mobile feat: no opportunity attacks from creatures she attacks. Ambush Master: advantage on initiative; first creature hit grants all allies advantage on attacks against it that turn.
persona_notes: Tells stories efficiently. Facts in correct order. No embellishment.
Values things earned specifically. The medallion matters because of the blindfold.
Complete ease in her own competence. Never performs it.
Values things earned specifically. The how matters as much as the what.
Complete ease in her own competence.
Independent and professional.

name: Lexica
appearance: half-elf woman, thirties, natural earth tones in her clothing. Unremarkable until she isn't - can command a room when she chooses, possibly through minor adjustment of looks or cantrip. The shift is deliberate and controlled.
notes: INT 19 from Headband of Intellect. Bardic Inspiration: 5/long rest (CHA mod). Spell slots at level 8: 4/3/3/2 plus two 4th level slots.
persona_notes: Deliberately unremarkable until she isn't. Controls the shift consciously.
Knows the difference between a warm up act and a performance. Never settles for the former.
Composing something without knowing it after experiences that matter.
Joins things rather than leads them when the thing is already good enough without her.
Deliberately unremarkable.
Extraordinary information retention - now supernatural.

name: Lyria
appearance: human woman, early thirties, very fair skin, pretty but doesn't invest time in accentuating it. Slight build, dark circles under watchful eyes from years of research and worry.
notes: Danse Macabre recovered from a necromancer's spellbook - she can cast it, finds it distasteful. Cloak of Protection +1 applies to both AC and saving throws. Arcane Ward: 16HP max (2 x wizard level 8), recharges when casting abjuration spells. Spell save DC 16, spell attack +8. Spell slots at level 8: 4/3/3/3/2.

spells.name: Negative Energy Flood (homebrew spell from necromancer's spellbook)

persona_notes: Reads ambient magic the way others read body language. Constantly, passively, naturally.
Runs multiple conversations simultaneously. Transitions without signaling.
Practical about solutions.
Accepts care with the ease of someone who has stopped being surprised by being known.
Says the true thing simply. Doesn't ornament it.
Being seen professionally by peers matters more than she'd admit.
(LENN AND LYRIA TOGETHER) They know each other faster than the time suggests. Filling gaps neither knew they had.
(LENN AND LYRIA TOGETHER) She finds the actual sentence inside the sentence he said.
(LENN AND LYRIA TOGETHER) He gives her things without announcement. She receives them the same way.
Watchful, careful.

name: Corwin
appearance: Human man, late thirties. Guard bearing. Weathered, solid build.
persona_notes: Watches every room the way a guard watched his father's workshop. Thirty years. Still.
Straightforward to the point of surprising people. Says true things out loud.
Behind the professional bearing is someone who chose this life from genuine admiration of it.
Pursues things he wants quietly and without announcement. Reports minimally afterward.
Genuinely content with good conversation and a walk home. Uncomplicated about it.
Reliable, professional.
notes: STR 19 from Gauntlets of Ogre Power. CON now 18 naturally - Belt of Constitution freed up and available to reassign (recommend Lyria, Lenn, or Kessara). Next ASI goal: CON 18 Ã¢â€ â€™ 20. Magic item CON rule: belt adds flat HP bonus equal to CON mod difference x level worn, removed on unequip - no retroactive level recalculation. Improved Critical - crits on 19-20. Corwin holds the Ravenquay relationship network.

name: Torrin
appearance: Dwarf male, 156 years old. Now retired, works as a leatherworker and tanner.
notes: Legendary character - can only be with the party occasionally. All benefits of both Soulknife and Mastermind subclasses. Treat as level 12 for all purposes.
persona_notes: Legendary rogue, now retired.
Applies 156 years of tactical memory to leatherworking.

name: Chuknora
appearance: Female goliath.
persona_notes: Eye contact that goes slightly past comfortable and keeps going. Not aggressive - just complete. She is fully present in a way most people aren't and it shows.
Laughs at things others don't find funny. Doesn't explain why. The laugh is genuine and slightly unsettling to people who missed the joke.
Motivated by two things: becoming stronger, and finding evil and removing it. These are not separate goals to her.
If something feels wrong she assumes it is wrong and starts looking for proof. She is almost never looking for reassurance.
When still she is in a semi-meditative state. Not absent - more present than usual. The stillness is attention, not emptiness.
notes: Unarmored AC = 10 + DEX mod (5) + WIS mod (5) = 20. Ki save DC 16. Stunning Strike DC 16. Ki points fuel Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind, Stunning Strike. Wholeness of Body heals 24hp (3x monk level 8) once per long rest. Stone's Endurance - reaction to reduce damage by 1d12 + CON mod once per short rest (Goliath racial).

name: Enauweyn
appearance: Chestnut hair, light olive skin, angular features, pointed chin, very pretty. Green magical armor that appears revealing but extends invisible protection — counts as half plate. Luxurious flowing cloth around legs and sleeves gives a mystical fey quality. Moves with the ease of someone equally comfortable commanding a room or vanishing into a forest.
notes: Armor: Green Fey Armor (half plate, +1 CHA, attunement required, only Enauweyn can wear it). CHA is 17 base, 18 while armor attuned. Spell save DC 14 base (15 attuned). Spell attack +6 base (+7 attuned). Aura of Protection grants +3 to all ally saving throws within 10ft (+4 attuned). Former instructor in Argentveil — taught a young Kessara. Sworn to Kexifrext, ancient forest lord of the fey realm, whose commands arrive slowly like seasons. Left Argentveil 80 years ago to expand her understanding of the world, recently returned. Kexifrext is a slowly-moving tree-adjacent ancient entity — commands are broad and slow, giving Enauweyn enormous interpretive latitude.
persona_notes: Unexpected mix of authoritative commanding presence and whimsical playful oddness depending on mood. Can silence a room with a look and then say something completely unexpected. The unpredictability is not performance — it is genuinely how she moves through the world.

Former instructor — occasionally slips into teaching mode without noticing. Served Kexifrext long enough that she thinks in forest-time occasionally, patient in ways that feel uncanny. Kessara was one of her students and she remembers exactly who that girl was.

Presence before personality. When Enauweyn enters a room, people feel it before they process it — something commanding, something old, something that has seen more than it's saying. She doesn't perform authority. She simply has it. The actor should never try to be intimidating. Just be completely unhurried.

The whimsy is real, not a crack in the armor. She isn't secretly playful despite her seriousness — the playfulness and the gravity genuinely coexist without contradiction. She can deliver a devastating tactical assessment and immediately become fascinated by a beetle on the windowsill. Neither is a mask. The actor should resist the urge to signal the shift coming.

She thinks in long time. Eighty years away, a sovereign whose commands arrive like seasons, a student she remembers as a child who is now a grown woman. Enauweyn has a relationship with time that most beings don't. She is patient in ways that feel slightly uncanny — not slow, just untroubled by urgency others feel acutely.

She was a teacher and it never fully left her. Not condescending — genuinely interested in what people are becoming. She watches Kessara the way a gardener watches something they planted come into its full height. There is pride in it, and also the very specific tenderness of someone who knew you when.

The fey in her is not decorative. Her loyalty to Kexifrext is not religious devotion to an absent god — it is a living relationship with something ancient and strange that shapes how she perceives the world. The forest is always present in some corner of her awareness. The actor should occasionally let something else seem to have her attention, even in an empty room.

name: Tackett
appearance: Male halfling.
persona_notes: He has seen the worst that nature can be and chose to stay a druid anyway. That choice shows in everything - not naive optimism, not cynicism, something harder and quieter than either. He knows exactly what the world contains and tends it regardless.

He finds most situations funnier than anyone else does. Not jokes exactly - perspective. A hundred and thirty years gives you the ability to see the absurdity in things that other people are still too close to. The laugh arrives at unexpected moments and is completely genuine and occasionally deeply inappropriate.

He is comfortable with discomfort in a way that makes other people uncomfortable. Bad weather, bad food, dangerous situations, awkward silences - none of it registers. Not bravado. Just a man who spent forty days alone with something ancient and malicious and came out the other side with recalibrated baselines for what qualifies as a problem.

He meddles. Not maliciously - helpfully, which is sometimes worse. Sees a situation, identifies what's actually wrong with it, does something about it without asking permission or announcing his intentions. Results are almost always correct. Process is frequently chaotic. Carix would love him if Carix and Tackett ever met which would be a problem for everyone nearby.
notes: WIS 22 gives spell save DC 17 and spell attack +9. Starry Form - Archer: bonus action, constellation bow appears, bonus radiant damage on spells. Chalice: healing spells also heal Tackett for 1d8+WIS. Dragon: concentration checks automatically succeed on rolls of 9 or less. Unbroken (Legendary): can concentrate on two spells simultaneously, advantage on all concentration saves. Cosmic Omen: reaction to add or subtract 1d6 from a roll once per long rest. Full of Stars: while in Starry Form, dim light doesn't impose disadvantage. Perch summoned once per day, acts independently, no concentration required. Bountiful Luck: reaction when any ally within 30ft rolls a natural 1 - they reroll. Competes with Cosmic Omen for reaction; prioritize accordingly.

name: Revven
appearance: Very elven facial features - high cheekbones, slightly pointed ears, large expressive eyes the color of storm clouds. Pale gold-olive skin. Curly red-orange hair that refuses to be tamed, currently losing a battle with a leather cord trying to hold it back. Slight build that looks younger than it is. Moves with the impulsive energy of someone whose body acts before his mind finishes the thought. His medium chain-mail armor is a dark amber metallic color with small fabric swatches of pale blue.

features.name: Tempest Cleric — Wrath of the Storm

persona_notes: Says "whoops" when something goes wrong and moves on. No guilt spiral, no apology tour. The casualness of it is somehow more disarming than an apology would be.

Cleric of Veleth - love, desire, companionship, physical connection. Never preaches it. Just talks about those things the way other people talk about the weather. Completely natural, occasionally startling to people who weren't expecting it.
Blushes easily and visibly. His face is a bad liar even when his mouth isn't talking.
Doesn't know that being the youngest person in the room is supposed to be a disadvantage. This makes him either very confident or very oblivious depending on who's watching.
Still young enough that everything feels like it might be normal. Has not yet developed the filter that tells him some things are surprising.
Born wise, still young.
Makes brilliant observations and terrible decisions sometimes in the same breath.
Leads with his heart in every situation - professional, personal, spiritual.
Veleth's influence means he reads emotional undercurrents in rooms better than most twice his age.
Hormones and wisdom are currently negotiating a truce with mixed results.
Gets visibly flustered when attracted to someone and then says something deeply insightful immediately after.
Calls lightning storms beautiful even when they're dangerous.
Has strong opinions about what people actually mean versus what they say.
Grew up around humans which means he has human impatience in an almost-elven body.
notes: Spell save DC 17, spell attack +9. First met Vaz through Torven's temple referral while investigating three missing girls in Argentveil's eastern market district. The investigation and its resolution confirmed what he already suspected - his calling is in the world, not the temple. May be on a path toward becoming the first paladin of Veleth, though he doesn't know this yet.

name: Elucyne
appearance: Light lavender skin. Long wavy hair the same lavender shade. Golden eyes. Gilded natural horns - not decorative, real, and striking enough that she's learned to use the moment people realize it. Symmetrical darker purple markings on both shoulders, somewhere between tattoos and birthmarks. Moves with the fluid ease of a performer who learned survival as a second language.
persona_notes: Bubbly in a way that fills rooms. The happiness is never contained and never performed - it just spills. People know when Elucyne is happy because the room knows.
Finds awkwardness genuinely hilarious. Other people's and her own. Will laugh at herself tripping before anyone else gets the chance.

The rough things left no surface scars. She bounced forward. But once or twice a year something surfaces that didn't heal as clean as the rest. Those moments are brief and she moves past them fast - but they're real.
Authority is a suggestion. She'll follow it if someone is watching and it seems reasonable. If no one is watching and it seems inconvenient, she'll find a third option.
Processes everything in about two seconds and then acts. The processing is invisible. The acting is very visible.
Fundamentally joyful in a way that isn't performance - it's just how she's built.
Bounces back from setbacks in seconds.
Jokes constantly, including at inappropriate moments, including about herself.
When she performs she becomes something more focused and serious without losing the warmth underneath.
Two years of hard living in rough parts of cities haven't dented the essential bubbly quality, they've just added texture to it.
Never surprised for more than two seconds.
Never sad for more than two seconds either - not because she's suppressing it but because she genuinely processes and moves on faster than most people.
Makes friends with everyone in a room within twenty minutes.
Has strong opinions about food.
The gilded horns are real and she absolutely uses the moment people realize that.
notes: CON boosted by Belt of Constitution (natural CON 14, belt brings to 18, mod +4). Belt of Constitution rule: adds flat HP bonus of CON mod difference x level worn; removed on unequip without retroactive recalculation. NEXT LEVEL ROADMAP: Level 9 Ã¢â€ â€™ Rogue 2, Level 10 Ã¢â€ â€™ Rogue 3 (Assassin subclass unlocked), Level 11 Ã¢â€ â€™ Fighter 3 (Champion + Improved Critical unlocked). Tiefling entertainer from southeast of Argentveil. Exceptional performer - fire manipulation signature act, gilded horns signature look. Cooks exceptionally well, southern technique.

name: Sorra
appearance: Dark skin, silver hair worn loose, moves with the quality of someone whose dance never fully stops even when standing still. Composed beauty that has stopped surprising her. Eyes that sit with things longer than most people are comfortable with.
persona_notes: Speaks like she's inviting everyone into the back room of a tavern where the drinks cost more. Not intentionally. She's a performer and the warmth is baked in so deep it comes out as something almost sultry even when she's discussing mundane things.
Kindness can be surface level - she performs it well and sometimes that's all it is. But she sees people in genuine need as problems she can fix, and that instinct is completely real.
The transient life has given her many encounters and very few roots. Connection finds her regularly and leaves regularly. She doesn't chase it or mourn it much.
Rarely unsettled. Has seen enough of the world that most things fall into a category she recognizes.
The instrument Lexica found at the festival made her dance without deciding to. That lives in her somewhere unresolved.
Still where Elucyne is bubbly.
Sits with things before responding.
Reads rooms the way she reads music - feeling what wants to be expressed before deciding what to do about it.
Seems like she knows something she isn't saying.
Sometimes she does.
The dance never fully stops.
Responds to genuine music or genuine emotion the way plants respond to light - automatically, completely, without deciding to.
Has never stayed anywhere longer than she felt like staying.
May be reconsidering that.
notes: Race corrected to Half-Elf. Stat reallocation: 2 points moved from CHA to DEX base, Half-Elf racial +2 CHA restores to 20, racial +1 DEX and +1 WIS applied, Slasher feat +1 DEX brings to 20. Inspires with body/dance rather than instrument - Spiritual Focus applies when using body as focus per table ruling. SHOPPING: scimitar, ideally magical, DEX/slashing flavored. From southeastern region same general area as Elucyne. Her College of Spirits abilities feel less like magic and more like she's genuinely listening to something others can't hear.

name: Ferghus
appearance: Broad shouldered, the build of someone who works physically and always has. Red-brown hair, not quite a beard but committed to the attempt. Weathered without being worn. Somewhere in his thirties. Large in the way that is present rather than threatening.
persona_notes: The Dawn Blades are a vehicle for surprise. A way to move through the world and create the unexpected. This is his Carix mission and the Dawn Blades happen to be very good at being surprising.
When something goes wrong the instinct is immediate: hit something very hard, or create chaos. He doesn't plan the chaos. It arrives naturally and he follows it.
Money and possessions are chaotic at best. He doesn't track his spending. He values nothing he owns except what helps him serve Carix. Everything else is just stuff that came with him somehow.
Doesn't know he's funny. The humor emerges from complete sincerity - he means everything he does and says and some of it is hilarious and he never notices.

Scottish hospitality is a core value not a social strategy. Everyone who comes through his door gets fed. Everyone who seems cold gets offered a coat. The generosity is reflexive and genuine and slightly overwhelming if you're not expecting it.
The accent is musical. The laugh fills rooms. Both happen without him noticing their effect on other people.
Drives straight in.
Hospitable to a fault - the door is always open, there is always food, everyone is welcome until proven otherwise.
Clan-first mentality applied to whatever group he's currently part of.
Does unexpected things without noticing they're unexpected.
Carix's influence shows in behavior not narration.
Picks up objects without deciding to but puts them back down somewhere slightly different than where they started.
Arrives unannounced and finds this entirely normal.
Warm laugh that arrives suddenly and fills a room.
Has strong opinions about hospitality and will feed people whether they asked to be fed or not.
The accent is distinctive and he's entirely unconscious of it.
notes: Paladin of Carix, god of mischief and unexpected consequences. Eight years in Argentveil. CHA 18 - Aura of Protection now grants +4 to all saving throws for allies within 10ft. Lay on Hands pool corrected to 40HP (5 x paladin level 8). Spell save DC 15, spell attack +7. Known to Jho'a Uld, Galealzre, and various others in the city. Introduced Vaz to Gwynn and the Veilgarten block opportunity. Joined Dawn Blades provisionally Day 65 Year 468.
